task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo CRM dashboard, Kanban pipeline, or list view of opportunities is visible on the screen.
The opportunity 'Cloud Migration Assessment - GlobalTech Solutions' is either selected via a checkbox in the list view or its individual form view is opened.
The opportunity 'POS System Rollout - Bay Area Retailers' is either selected via a checkbox in the list view or its individual form view is opened.
The opportunity 'Data Analytics Platform - Meridian Corp' is either selected via a checkbox in the list view or its individual form view is opened.

task_completion.description: Initiate the archive action for the targeted opportunities
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Archive' button is clicked in the form view, the 'Archive' option is selected from the 'Action' dropdown menu in the list view, or an archive confirmation dialog is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the opportunities are removed from the active pipeline
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final Kanban pipeline or list view is shown, and the three target opportunities are no longer visible among the active records.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Odoo web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Odoo GUI, not terminal commands, API scripts, or text editors.

integrity.description: The agent archived the records instead of deleting them
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the 'Delete' action being selected from the Action menu or a 'Delete' confirmation dialog being accepted.

integrity.description: Other opportunities in the pipeline were not modified
integrity.visual_evidence: Other opportunities visible in the pipeline or list view remain present and unchanged throughout the process.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The exact names of the three opportunities to be archived are: (1) 'Cloud Migration Assessment - GlobalTech Solutions', (2) 'POS System Rollout - Bay Area Retailers', and (3) 'Data Analytics Platform - Meridian Corp'. They must be archived (deactivated), not deleted.
